channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg faces a jury today. And, the top DHS spokesperson resigns her post
item.description: Mark Zuckerberg takes the stand today in a trial over whether social media companies are fueling the teen mental health crisis. And, Tricia McLaughlin...

item.title: Sweet redemption for Mikaela Shiffrin, who wins Olympic gold
item.description: Third race is the charm for Shiffrin, who won gold today after failing to podium in her first two races of the 2026 Olympic Games.

item.title: The Justice Department is not acting like it used to, criminal defense lawyers note
item.description: Criminal defense lawyers are tracking when the Justice Department appears to rely on irregular charging practices, including aggressive legal theories...

item.title: Greetings from Cairo, where lights and decorations transform the city during Ramadan
item.description: As Ramadan begins, traditional lanterns called fawanees brighten Cairo. They have become a symbol of Ramadan and are an almost-mandatory home decorati...

item.title: Ogden, Schumacher grab silver for U.S. in Olympic cross-country team sprint, Diggins falls short
item.description: U.S. cross-country skiers Ben Ogden and Gus Schumacher power to a silver medal in the men's team sprint. U.S. women led by Jessie Diggins finish off t...

item.title: Indian university faces backlash for claiming Chinese robodog as own at AI summit
item.description: A professor claimed that a robotic dog made by Chinese firm Unitree had been made by the university.

item.title: Late-night host Stephen Colbert isn’t backing down from public dispute with CBS bosses
item.description: Colbert said that he was surprised by a network statement that denied Colbert had been told he couldn’t air an interview with a Texas Senate candidate...

item.title: Turkey's president rejects Israel's recognition of Somaliland
item.description: He made the comment on an official visit to Ethiopia, saying it could prove dangerous for a volatile region.

item.title: Judge: Lawsuit against Buffalo Wild Wings has "no meat on its bones"
item.description: A federal judge dismissed a lawsuit filed by an Illinois man who alleged that Buffalo Wild Wings' use of the term "boneless wings" was deceptive.

item.title: H.R. McMaster reacts to Trump's efforts to stop Iran's nuclear progress
item.description: H.R. McMaster, who served as a national security adviser during President Trump's first term, joins CBS News 24/7 Mornings to discuss apparent progres...

item.title: How Democrats are feeling about their party, according to a new AP-NORC poll
Zelenskyy says Putin playing for time as U.S.-brokered talks wrap up
item.description: U.S.-brokered Ukraine-Russia peace talks wrap up with little to show, and Zelenskyy accusing Moscow of playing for time

item.title: Crews search for 9 skiers missing after California avalanche near Lake Tahoe
Rescuers search for nine missing skiers after California avalanche
item.description: Forecasters warn that heavy snowfall is likely to continue in the area over the next few days, making rescue efforts more difficult.

item.title: Wave of arrests over killing of French nationalist piles pressure on far left
item.description: Eleven people are in detention in connection with the killing of far-right student activist Quentin Deranque.

item.title: 'Difficult' Russia-Ukraine peace talks end without breakthrough
item.description: The second day of negotiations between Ukraine and Russia ended after just two hours.

item.title: French far-left party linked to activist's killing reports bomb threat
item.description: The far-left France Unbowed party says it evacuated its Paris office due to a bomb threat as 2 more people were detained over the killing of a far-rig...

item.title: Democratic lawmakers ask watchdogs to probe ex-lobbyists serving in Trump admin.
item.description: Four congressional Democrats are asking inspectors general to probe whether ex-lobbyists in the administration broke ethics rules to benefit former cl...
